title: feuilleea subnervosa
intro: Feuilleea subnervosa, also known as Pricklyback or Pseudolarix kaempferi, is a plant species in the cypress family (Cupressaceae) native to China. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Feuilleea subnervosa is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
